eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects tight uncertainty in National Weather Service forecasts for Los Angeles' highest temperature on May 12, with 31.5% implied probabilities each for 68-69°F and 70°F or higher, trailing closely behind 66-67°F at 27.5%. eventMetadata.context_description: T1 Esports Academy and Dplus Challengers lead trader consensus at 32% implied probabilities each after dominating Rounds 1-2 regular season with near-identical 9-3/8-4 series records and 18-12 game differentials atop the standings, showcasing consistent Bo3 wins in double round-robin play through Week 6. HLE Challengers (24%) and Gen.G Global Academy (23%) trail in odds despite 4-8 and 2-10 marks, buoyed by parent teams' LCK dominance—HLE at 9-1 atop main league standings—and expectations of mid-season roster boosts or prospect surges common in academy circuits. KT Rolster Challengers and SOOPers Challengers (both ~20%) lurk close at 7-5, with top-five advancement to the Challenge Group for Rounds 3-4 keeping the path to overall 2026 title wide open amid Week 7 matchups looming.

markets.question: Will T1 make a roster change before July?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if any player joins or leaves T1's active League of Legends roster (defined as the active lineup listed on the T1 Liquipedia page: https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/T1) by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

As of market creation the active roster consists of the following players: Doran, Oner, Faker, Peyz, and Keria. Name changes or aliases referring to the same player do not qualify as roster changes.

For the purpose of this market, "roster change" refers to any official signing, transfer, benching to inactive/reserve, release, retirement, or departure of a player from the active lineup. This includes adding new players (transfers, free agent signings, or loans), removing players (to inactive, free agency, or other teams), or any change resulting in a different active roster.

Coach changes and temporary stand-ins for a single match will not count.

The primary resolution source for this market will be Liquipedia; however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

Long-term deals—Faker to 2029, Oner and Peyz to 2028, Keria to 2029—anchor the core, reinforced by recent staff tweaks like Easyhoon's coaching addition following kkOma's temporary leave. Prolonged struggles or a shallow playoff exit could spur mid-split benching or top-lane swap before July's Summer lock; conversely, a deep run would solidify the lineup per T1's history of international peaks despite domestic inconsistencies.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors no criminal charges against Les Wexner by June 30, reflecting the absence of any DOJ indictment or active federal prosecution despite heightened scrutiny. In February 2026, Wexner, the former L Brands CEO and Epstein's longtime financial patron, testified in a closed-door House Oversight Committee deposition, denying knowledge of Epstein's crimes, claiming he was duped and that Epstein stole vast sums from him—echoing prior statements without prompting charges. Recent civil lawsuits by Epstein victims in April 2026 allege Wexner enabled abuse through financial support, but these remain distinct from criminal proceedings. FBI documents listing him as a potential co-conspirator date to 2019 investigations that yielded no case, underscoring significant evidentiary or prosecutorial barriers amid his age (88) and expired statutes for many events.

eventMetadata.context_description: Following Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's confirmed death in late February 2026 during a US-Israeli strike amid regional escalation, Iran's Assembly of Experts appointed his son, Mojtaba Khamenei, as Supreme Leader in early March, marking a rapid leadership transition. Mojtaba has not appeared publicly since, amid reports of injuries from the same incident—including facial disfigurement and leg wounds—prompting health rumors quelled by officials like President Pezeshkian, who confirmed a recent meeting on May 7. Real power has shifted to IRGC commanders via the Supreme National Security Council, driving militarized decisions in ongoing US talks, failed Islamabad negotiations, and proxy conflicts, fostering trader uncertainty over further instability before year-end diplomatic deadlines.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 840-879 tweets in May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X during the month of May 2026.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

markets.question: Will Paloma Valencia place 2nd in the 1st round of the 2026 Colombian presidential election?
markets.description:
Colombia's presidential elections are scheduled for May 31, 2026, and a second round (if required) on June 21, 2026, in case no candidate secures more than 50% of the valid votes in the first round.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the results of the first round of the Colombian presidential election are not known by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the election results, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by Colombia's National Civil Registry (Registraduría Nacional del Estado Civil) (https://registraduria.gov.co).

markets.question: Santos FC vs. Red Bull Bragantino: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Série A game between Santos FC and Red Bull Bragantino, scheduled for May 10 at 5:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Santos FC and Red Bull Bragantino each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on cbf.com.br. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

Santos desperately needs points in their relegation scrap, bolstered by home advantage and competitive head-to-head history—including a 2-2 draw last September—but faces injury woes with right-back Mayke (knee), midfielder Gabriel Menino (hamstring), and uncertainty over star forward Neymar following March muscle fatigue that sidelined him briefly. markets.question: Will EUR/USD hit 1.35 (High) in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Investing.com high price (“H”) for any EUR/USD hourly candle for an hour on or before the listed end date (ET) is equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Data for a given candle will be considered finalized once the next candle appears on the specified graph. The last trading day of a given week will be considered finalized once the market closes on that day, typically at 5 PM ET on Friday.

This market will resolve as soon as any finalized EUR/USD hourly candle high price is equal to or above the listed price, or once the final hourly candle in the specified period is finalized. A candle starting at 11:00 PM ET on a given date will be considered to be on that date.

This market’s resolution will be based solely on information from the “H” figure located at the top of the EUR/USD Streaming Chart on Investing.com for the specified currency pair (e.g., https://www.investing.com/currencies/eur-usd-chart).

markets.question: Will the median home value in the DC Metro area be between $566,000 and $572,000 on May 31?

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The resolution source will be official data from the Parcl Labs Sales Price Index for the Washington, D.C. Metro area (Parcl_ID: 2900475). markets.question: Will there be exactly 0 earthquakes of magnitude 6.5 or higher worldwide from May 4 - 10?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the total number of earthquakes with a magnitude of 6.5 or higher that occur anywhere on Earth between May 4, 2026, 12:00 AM ET, and May 10, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

The resolution source for this market is the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Earthquake Hazards Program (https://earthquake.usgs.gov/earthquakes/browse/significant.php#sigdef).

If an earthquake of substantial size has occurred within this market's timeframe but not yet appeared on the resolution source, this market may remain open until June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or until the earthquake in question otherwise appears on the resolution source. If such an earthquake has not appeared on the resolution source by that date, another credible resolution source will be used.

This market may not resolve until the timeframe of this market has concluded. If a qualifying earthquake has been recorded on the final day, this market may remain open for 24 hours to allow for revisions to the recorded magnitude. After 24 hours, this market will resolve according to the latest provided data.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket assigns a 95.5% implied probability to zero earthquakes of magnitude 6.5 or greater from May 4 to May 10, 2026, reflecting the complete absence of such events through May 10 according to U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) global seismic monitoring. Comprehensive networks reliably detect all M6.5+ quakes worldwide, and recent data show only moderate activity—four M5.0+ events by May 9—with no significant sequences, foreshocks, or tectonic hotspots building toward a major rupture. Historically, M6.0+ quakes average about 2.3 per week globally, making M6.5+ rarer at roughly one every 5–10 days, but the window's near-completion amid quiet conditions solidifies this positioning. A late-day M6.5+ in the final hours of May 10 remains possible though unlikely without precursors, potentially challenging the outcome if verified by USGS.

markets.question: Will a dozen eggs cost between $2.75–3.00 in April?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the bracket within which the price for "Eggs, Grade A, Large (Cost per Dozen) in U.S. City Average" lies when the April data point is published by the St. Louis Fed (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/APU0000708111).

The St. Louis Fed bases its numbers for egg prices on the BLS's CPI release. The April release is presently scheduled for May 12, 2026. Resolution of this market will take place upon the update of the St. Louis Fed's chart. If no data for the specified month is released by the date the next month's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available month.

The resolution source for this market measures prices to the third decimal place. Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices the $2.25–2.50/dozen range for the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) average retail price of grade A large eggs in April 2026 at a 66% implied probability, reflecting sustained supply recovery from 2025 avian influenza outbreaks that had driven prices above $6/dozen. March 2026 BLS data confirmed $2.348/dozen, down 6.2% from February's $2.50, as laying hen inventories rebounded amid fewer highly pathogenic H5N1 cases, boosting production and easing wholesale pressures. The $2.00–2.25 bin at 23.5% captures expectations of further moderation per USDA forecasts toward $2.16 later in 2026, tempered by seasonal Easter demand in early April. Resolution awaits the BLS April release on May 12.

markets.question: Will Steve Witkoff attend the next US x Iran diplomatic meeting?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual attends the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify.

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not qualify as diplomatic meetings.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

Attendance refers to the listed individual being physically present and actively participating in negotiations at the meeting.

If the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran takes place over multiple days, attendance at any part of the meeting will qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the listed individual and the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

Recent Genial/Quaest polls from late April 2026, published in early May, show PL candidates like Cláudio Castro leading in Rio de Janeiro and Filipe Barros competitive in Paraná, alongside strong showings in Minas Gerais and Pernambuco, positioning PL for multiple wins amid opposition momentum from the Senate's rejection of President Lula's Supreme Court nominee Jorge Messias. markets.question: Will Cristopher Sánchez lead the MLB in ERA for the 2026 regular season?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the pitcher who records the lowest earned run average among qualified pitchers during the 2026 Major League Baseball regular season.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official leader as determined by the rules of the MLB. If multiple leaders are announced then this market will resolve to the pitcher that records more innings pitched during the 2026 MLB regular season. If a tie still persists, this market will resolve in favor of the pitcher that records more strikeouts during the 2026 MLB regular season. If a tie still persists, then this market will resolve in favor of the pitcher that walked fewer batters during the 2026 MLB regular season. If a tie still persists, this market will resolve to the pitcher whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2026 MLB regular season is cancelled, postponed after October 15, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no official leader declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from MLB; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Jannik Sinner's commanding position as the trader-favored Wimbledon 2026 winner at 49.5% implied probability stems from his sustained dominance as world No. 1, capped by a record-breaking Mutua Madrid Open title last week and a straightforward second-round win over Sebastian Ofner at the ongoing Rome Masters. Carlos Alcaraz's 18.0% share reflects uncertainty from his right wrist injury, forcing withdrawals from Madrid, Rome, and the French Open—his third straight Roland Garros absence as defending champion. Novak Djokovic's drop to 8.0% follows an early upset loss to Dino Prizmic in Rome amid lingering injury concerns and age-related questions at 39, despite his seven Wimbledon titles. Alexander Zverev rounds out top pricing at 3.9% on consistent top-three rankings, while grass-court specialists like Jack Draper, Taylor Fritz, and Ben Shelton gain traction at 2-3% amid the impending surface switch post-French Open.

markets.question: Will Lovable be acquired before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if credible reporting confirms that any entity enters into an agreement to acquire the listed company by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Mergers where the listed company is subsumed by another entity will count toward a "Yes" resolution.

An announced agreement between the listed company and an acquiring entity will qualify for a “Yes” resolution, regardless of whether the acquisition is ultimately completed.

The primary resolution source for this market is official information from the listed company and/or its leadership; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: SpaceX's April 21 announcement of an option to acquire AI coding startup Cursor for $60 billion—or invest $10 billion alternatively—has catalyzed trader consensus toward AI consolidation, reflecting the sector's explosive M&A activity following Q1's record SpaceX-xAI deal. Microsoft reportedly eyed Cursor beforehand, underscoring hyperscalers' hunt for advanced developer tools amid large language model races. Elevated sentiment also surrounds Perplexity AI for search capabilities, GitLab amid DevOps competition from GitHub Copilot, and Nebius Group for AI infrastructure post-Yandex split. Competitive pressures on Snapchat and Zoom fuel speculation, with regulatory scrutiny and Q2 earnings as pivotal near-term catalysts before the 2026 year-end resolution.

markets.question: Fortuna Sittard vs. PEC Zwolle: O/U 3.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Eredivisie game between Fortuna Sittard and PEC Zwolle, scheduled for May 10 at 10:45 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Fortuna Sittard and PEC Zwolle combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on eredivisie.nl. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Fortuna Sittard vs. PEC Zwolle - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Eredivisie game, scheduled for May 10 at 10:45 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Fortuna Sittard, entrenched in 12th place in the Eredivisie table with 36 points from 30 matches, welcomes 13th-placed PEC Zwolle (34 points) to Fortuna Sittard Stadion on May 10 for a pivotal mid-table clash amid the relegation scrap. PEC Zwolle's 1-0 clean-sheet win in their December reverse fixture underscores their head-to-head edge (11 victories to Fortuna's 5), though Fortuna's recent 1-1 home draw versus NAC Breda on April 12 signals grit despite patchy home form. Both squads face injury woes—Fortuna missing goalkeeper Mattijs Branderhorst, Daley Sinkgraven, and Justin Lonwijk; PEC without Jamiro Monteiro, Shola Shoretire, and Samir Lagsir—potentially tilting the matchup toward a low-scoring stalemate as traders weigh home advantage against Zwolle's defensive resilience.

markets.question: Another GTA VI trailer released by May 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if another official trailer for the next GTA (GTA VI) is released by Rockstar Games or any of its official accounts, including but not limited to Rockstar's official website, YouTube channel, Twitter, or any other official social media platform between market creation and May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

An "official trailer" is defined as a video clearly labelled and marketed as a trailer for the game in question. Teasers, gameplay snippets, or other promotional materials will not qualify for resolution unless explicitly marketed as an official trailer by Rockstar Games.

This market will resolve immediately if such an official trailer is released by the expiry date. If no official trailer is released by the specified date, this market will resolve to "No".

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects a 68.5% implied probability for a third GTA VI trailer by May 31, driven by escalating rumors of an imminent drop ahead of Take-Two Interactive's Q4 FY2026 earnings call on May 21. Recent speculation intensified over the past two weeks, with insiders claiming Trailer 3 content is finalized for an early-to-mid May release, echoing Rockstar's surprise Trailer 2 shadow drop exactly one year ago on May 6, 2025, post-delay announcement. Hype has built via social media patterns analyzing historical trailer timings—pointing to dates like May 12 or 14—and pre-order buzz at $69.99, as marketing ramps for the confirmed November 19 launch. While unverified, the skin-in-the-game crowd sees these catalysts outweighing Rockstar's radio silence, though a post-earnings quiet period could delay beyond the deadline.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the WI-05 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the WI-05 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors the Republican Party at 84% implied probability to win Wisconsin's 5th Congressional District House seat, reflecting Rep. Scott Fitzgerald's incumbency advantage in a district rated Solid Republican by the Cook Political Report with an R+11 partisan lean. Fitzgerald won his last general election by 64.5% and faces no serious primary challengers ahead of the June 1 filing deadline and August 11 primaries. Democrats field Andrew Beck and Ben Steinhoff in their primary, but both lack the name recognition or fundraising to threaten a flip in this suburban Milwaukee stronghold, despite slight leftward trends in recent cycles. No recent polling or developments have shifted the dynamics, underscoring structural barriers to a Democratic upset absent a major national wave or scandal.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Buenos Aires be 17°C on May 11?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Minister Pistarini Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 11 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Minister Pistarini Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/ar/ezeiza/SAEZ.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will Xi Jinping visit US before 2027?
markets.description:
If Xi Jinping visits the United States between market creation and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purpose of this market, a "visit" is defined as Xi Jinping physically entering the terrestrial or maritime territory of the United States. Whether or not Xi Jinping enters US airspace during the timeframe of this market will have no bearing on a positive resolution.

The primary resolution source for this information will be official information from the US or China, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices a 72.5% chance of Chinese President Xi Jinping visiting the United States before 2027, driven by U.S. President Donald Trump's confirmed state visit to Beijing on May 14-15, 2026—the first by a sitting U.S. president in nearly a decade—and White House statements affirming plans for a reciprocal Xi visit later this year, potentially tied to G20 hosting in Miami. Recent announcements follow earlier reciprocal pledges from late 2025 and January 2026, amid renewed bilateral diplomacy on trade, AI, energy, and Iran war fallout, despite Xi's inbound hosting strategy for foreign leaders. The upcoming summit could solidify scheduling, though uncertainties around Taiwan tensions and global crises temper full certainty.

An announcement of a new permanent manager's appointment before this market's close date will immediately resolve this market to the corresponding option, regardless of when the announced appointment goes into effect.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Boston Red Sox; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

markets.question: Will Xi meet with Takaichi by December 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Sanae Takaichi meets with Xi Jinping between market creation and the listed date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A meeting is defined as any encounter where both Takaichi and Jinping are present and interact with each other in person.

An exchange of words, handshake, direct conversation, or other clear personal interaction between the named individuals will qualify as a meeting. Merely standing in proximity, making eye contact, or being present in the same room or event without direct interaction will not qualify.

The resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, reelected in a February 2026 landslide that solidified her hawkish stance on China, has not met President Xi Jinping since their October 2025 APEC summit in South Korea, where they discussed stable ties amid rare earth export controls and Senkaku Islands tensions. Ongoing 2025-2026 China-Japan diplomatic strains, exacerbated by Tokyo's defense buildup and closer U.S. alignment—including recent talks with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent—have cooled bilateral diplomacy. Traders weigh prospects for a pre-December 31, 2026, summit at potential forums like the G20 or APEC, against risks from territorial disputes, Beijing's export restrictions, and Takaichi's "Japan First" Indo-Pacific policy, reflecting uncertain de-escalation signals.

Golden Lions dominated the regular season at 6-1 series (13-3 games), but Volticons snapped their streak with a 2-1 week 6 victory—their sole loss—and extended a five-game win streak by edging Malvinas Gaming 3-2 in playoffs on April 28, dropping the #2 seed to lower bracket contention at 13.5%. Head-to-head parity, roster stability, and double-elimination format keep the race intensely competitive, with lower bracket survivors like Malvinas posing upset threats.

State Rep. Joseph Chaplik, at 17.8%, draws grassroots appeal as a district resident with a proven conservative legislative record in Scottsdale's LD3, bolstered by an April poll showing him ahead amid high undecideds, though traders prioritize Feely's resources ahead of the July 21 primary. A May 5 PBS debate between Feely and John Trobough highlighted attacks on Feely as a carpetbagger, but failed to dent his momentum in this open seat race vacated by David Schweikert's gubernatorial bid.

markets.question: Will Starmer say "Liz" or "Truss" during the next Prime Minister's Questions event?
markets.description:
Keir Starmer is scheduled to participate in the Prime Minister's Questions (PMQs) in the Commons Chamber in the Palace of Westminster on every Wednesday. (https://www.parliament.uk/visiting/visiting-and-tours/watch-committees-and-debates/prime-ministers-questions/).

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Keir Starmer says the listed term during the next Prime Minister's Question Time event he participates in. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Any usage of the term regardless of context will count toward the resolution of this market.

Pluralization/possessive of the term will count toward the resolution of this market, however other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

If no such Prime Minister's Question Time event happens by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No". If Starmer ceases to be Prime Minister for any length of time by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

This market is explicitly about scheduled events featuring Keir Starmer titled "Prime Minister's Question Time" (https://www.parallelparliament.co.uk/mp/keir-starmer/dept/cabinet-office/calendar). Speeches, events, or comments that occur outside of named, scheduled events will not qualify toward this market's resolution. If the event contains a Q&A, it will count toward the resolution of this market.

The resolution source will be video of the events. Only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Following Labour's significant losses in recent local elections, Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces intense scrutiny at the next Prime Minister's Questions on Wednesday, May 14, the first after Parliament's State Opening on May 13. Opposition leader Kemi Badenoch is likely to press on the party's drubbing, ongoing Peter Mandelson appointment scandal involving vetting irregularities and claims of misleading Parliament, and cost-of-living pressures amid planned fuel duty cuts and closer European ties including a youth mobility scheme by 2027. Starmer's recent interviews emphasize his commitment to a 10-year reform agenda and focus on foreign policy challenges like the Iran conflict and Ukraine, shaping trader assessments of his scripted responses in the 30-minute Commons session where MPs submit questions in advance but exchanges remain unpredictable.
